## my spectrwm config
<div align="left">
```Go
         spectrwm config
  -------------------------------
  wm           -> spectrwm
  bar          -> polybar
  app launcher -> dmenu
  terminal     -> st/kitty
  editor       -> neovim/emacs/vscode(rare use cases)
  shell        -> zsh
  font         -> Jet Brains Mono NF
  music player -> cmus(no original config tho[yet] )
  
    ```


```Go
❄️                  Setup / DWM                   ❄️
---------------------------------------------------
╭─ Distro          -> Arch Linux
├─ Editor          -> NeoVim / Emacs
├─ Browser         -> Firefox / qutebrowser
├─ Shell           -> zsh
╰─ Process Viewer  -> btop
 
╭─ Music Player    -> cmus
├─ Compositor      -> picom
├─ Notifications   -> dunst
├─ Media Player    -> mpv
╰─ File Manager    -> ranger
 
╭─ WM              -> dwm
├─ Terminal        -> st
├─ App Laucher     -> dmenu
├─ Theme           -> pywal
╰─ Font            -> JetBrainsMono NF
```
```Go
❄️                  Setup / DWM                   ❄️
---------------------------------------------------
╭─ Distro          -> Arch Linux
├─ Editor          -> NeoVim / Emacs
├─ Browser         -> Firefox / qutebrowser
├─ Shell           -> zsh

╭─ WM              -> dwm
```
